log: --- Mountain Dwarf — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:11+3=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:14+-2=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Mountain Dwarf — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:18+6=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 8 damage. Mountain Dwarf — Bardic Musician HP: 59/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
--- Mountain Dwarf — Bardic Musician --- HP: 59/67 | AC: 14
